Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I'd been interested in seeing that film for a while now. It was a fascinating watch...[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}While the road trip plot was nothing out of the ordinary, the way the characters expressed their emotions was masterful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}When the main character left everything behind to go on a journey... That really struck a chord with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}And then, in the final scene, he decided to return to his normal life... I wonder if he was happy with that decision.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Have you ever thought of running away to a place like that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Somewhere far away, where no one knows who you are?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...I see. So you feel that way too sometimes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I'm not saying I wish to leave everything behind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It's just that... every now and then, the things that matter are the very things that hold you back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The future of the company... The weight of my responsibilities...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Sometimes I even wish that I wasn't shackled by the Kirijo family name...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}...I know. I understand that I can't afford to think this way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Listen to me, complaining like this... How pathetic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Talking to you has become something of an outlet for me. Heh, I'm sure you're sick of it by now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}The offer is quite tempting. I hope you know what you're getting into.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems to trust me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}While we're on the topic, there's something I'd like to ask you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 13 4 5 5}...Yes, that wasn't very becoming of me. I hope I didn't offend you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Well, I know how understanding you are. I'm sure you're just trying to encourage me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems to trust me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}While we're on the topic, there's something I'd like to ask you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Hypothetically, let's say that I was... interested in someone right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I knew I could never be with him, but even so, I couldn't help but harbor these feelings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Ah... Keep in mind, this is a what-if scenario.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You're right. I would be betraying the promise I made to my fiancé.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I've been looking all over for you. So this is where you've been![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Wait a minute. I didn't make any plans with you for today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}What does it matter? I managed to secure an opening in my schedule tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I'm a very busy man, you know. As a simple student, you're just going to have to work around it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Do you know how long I spent looking for you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Don't tell me you have something more important to do than spend time with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Why the long face? You're supposed to be my fiancée, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Honestly... I thought you understood our arrangement.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}If you're going to be my future wife, you'll need to learn some obedience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Why must you and your family always be so difficult?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Well, at least your father's not around anymore, so that's something of a relief.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I imagine you feel the same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}I don't care who he is. I won't let that comment stand![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Excuse me? You think you can get away with speaking to me like that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Of course you can't. The future of the Kirijo family depends on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Anything you do could affect the entire organization.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I'm sure even a high schooler like you can comprehend the consequences of your actions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}This is none of your business. Get lost![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Come on, Mitsuru... You know how this works. Corporate management is not child's play.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}No matter how smart you are, you're still going to need my knowledge and experience.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}And the Kirijo Group still needs the cooperation of my company, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Good girl, Mitsuru. I knew you would listen to reason.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Now, let's go. I've made reservations for us at a luxurious restaurant![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Thank you for today. It was quite fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}I appreciate the sentiment, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Come on, Mitsuru, hurry up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 83 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Who do you think you are, worming your way into her favor?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 84 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}You ought to know your place in society.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 85 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}A commoner like you isn't even fit to breathe the same air.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 86 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Don't you understand? You're just a nuisance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}There's a world of difference between you and us. Mitsuru, take care not to associate with his kind anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 93 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Wh-What...!? Why are you getting so angry!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 94 0 0}This is someone I have a great deal of respect for. If you insult him, you insult me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 96 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}What are you saying!? You would side with him over me...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 97 0 0}You said there was a world of difference between you and him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 98 0 0}Well, you're right. You can't compare to him at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 99 0 0}He stands on his own two feet, challenging fate with his own strength of will.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 100 0 0}Seeing his outlook on life has inspired and influenced me countless times![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 102 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}What do you mean he's inspired and influenced you? What are you trying to say!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 103 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}You're supposed to be my fiancée![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 104 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Are you implying I'm beneath this nobody!? Take that back this instant, Mitsuru![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 105 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}It's not too late to ask for forgiveness! Think about the future of your company![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 106 0 0}Don't make me repeat myself. I have a great deal of respect for him![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 107 0 0}I strive to be just like him in the future. You couldn't hope to understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 108 0 0}The Group will do just fine on its own. We don't need help from a weasel like you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 109 0 0}As of today, we'll have nothing to do with each other.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 110 0 0}And if you dare to attempt some petty retaliation, then next time, you'll have the full might of the Group to contend with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 111 0 0}Get out of here, you philistine! I don't want to see your face ever again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 115 0 0}Sorry you had to see all that. I don't know how I'll make this up to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 116 0 0}He could have said whatever he wanted about me, and I would've taken it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 117 0 0}But... when he mentioned my father, and you... I couldn't help myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 118 0 0}Heh, I'd certainly like to be so carefree...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 119 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}Still, I can't help but laugh at how stupid I was for letting someone like that take advantage of me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 121 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}If we get down to it, it was my own inaction that led things to this point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 122 0 0}Thanks to you, though, my eyes have finally been opened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 124 0 0}When I said that I have a great deal of respect for you, I meant every word.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 125 0 0}All right. It's been a rather eventful day, but we should head back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 126 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'll be sure to make up for this disturbance at a later time, but for now, let's move on with the evening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru's expression looks bright.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We decided to return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 127 0 0}You said there was a world of difference between you and him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 128 0 0}Well, you're right. You can't compare to him at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 129 0 0}He stands on his own two feet, challenging fate with his own strength of will.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 130 0 0}Seeing his outlook on life has inspired and influenced me countless times![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 136 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Now and forever...? What are you trying to say!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 137 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}You're supposed to be my fiancée![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 138 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Are you implying I'm beneath this nobody!? Take that back this instant, Mitsuru![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 139 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}It's not too late to ask for forgiveness! Think about the future of your company![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 142 0 0}You're not the one supporting me in my time of need...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 143 0 0}The Group will do just fine on its own. We don't need help from a weasel like you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 144 0 0}As of today, we'll have nothing to do with each other.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 145 0 0}And if you dare to attempt some petty retaliation, then next time, you'll have the full might of the Group to contend with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 146 0 0}Get out of here, you philistine! I don't want to see your face ever again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to return to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
